completed_phases.name: Transaction cost fix (0.3% → 0.6% TWSE / 0.7% TPEx)
completed_phases.summary: Replaced flat 0.3% commission with market-specific round-trip costs. TWSE 0.6%, TPEx 0.7%. Added _is_tpex() and _get_transaction_cost() helpers. Updated all 3 P&L paths. Verified via Z.ai review.

completed_phases.name: Data quality threshold fix (50-day → 240-day min for 300-day SMA)
completed_phases.summary: Changed data quality gate from 50-day to 240-day minimum (one full trading year). Below 240 days = low confidence, 240-270 = medium, 270+ = high. Fixed variable naming (min_days_50 → max_history_days).

notes: Phase 0-1 completed. Phase 1 edit tool errored but changes were correct — committed manually.
